title: Codiff Configuration
description: Configuration file for Codiff. Supports JSON and JSONC (JSON with Comments).

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema for editor autocompletion.

copyCommentsOnClose.description: Copy pending review comments to clipboard when closing a window.

diffStyle.description: Diff layout style. 'split' shows deleted and added lines side by side; 'unified' shows them in one column.

lastRepositoryPath.description: The last repository opened by Codiff when no path was explicitly provided.

openAIModel.description: The OpenAI model to use for review assistance and walkthroughs.

showOutdated.description: Show review comments anchored to outdated diff lines. Hidden by default, matching GitHub's review UI.

theme.description: Application color theme. 'system' follows OS preference.

wordWrap.description: Wrap long diff lines instead of using horizontal scrolling.

keymap.description: Keyboard shortcut overrides for in-app actions. Use 'Mod' for Cmd on macOS and Ctrl on other platforms.

fileFilter.description: Focus the file filter search input in the sidebar.

nextSearchMatch.description: Navigate to the next search match.

prevSearchMatch.description: Navigate to the previous search match.

submitComment.description: Submit a review comment to GitHub or ask Codex.

toggleSidebar.description: Toggle the sidebar between expanded and collapsed states.
